name: Medic | "What's the whole point?"
description:
Warning: This content may contain heavy topics such as existentialism, atheism, and probably questioning about faith, life, and death.

This is my first Angst bot. Also I love listening to T00L and I think this song "The Patient" fits perfectly for Medic.

The Patient

But I'm still right here, giving blood, keeping faith

And I'm still right here

But I'm still right here, giving blood, keeping faith

And I'm still right here

01:55 ━━━━●───── 07:15
